title: MYX: Place Limit Order
known_limitations: SGLT testnet pool rejects limit orders (0x613970e0). This recipe may fail on testnet — use mainnet pool or skip.

pre_conditions: NOTE: Limit orders may fail on SGLT testnet pool

steps.description: Record open order count before placing
Place limit buy at 50% below current price (won't fill)
steps.expression: (function(){var c=Engine.context.PerpsController;return c.getMarketDataWithPrices().then(function(markets){var myx=markets.filter(function(m){return m.providerId==='myx'});if(!myx.length)return JSON.stringify({error:'no MYX markets'});var m=myx[0];var limitPrice=String(parseFloat(m.price)*0.50);return c.placeOrder({symbol:m.symbol,isBuy:true,orderType:'limit',size:'0.05',leverage:10,usdAmount:'120',price:limitPrice,currentPrice:parseFloat(m.price)}).then(function(r){return JSON.stringify(r)})})})()

steps.description: Wait for order to appear on-chain
Confirm at least one open order exists
Cancel the order to clean up
